note: Sprint 5.17b: adds --only-worker-id-hash selector so --real-sign can target exactly one payable_item from a multi-worker proposal without falling back to the multi-output refuse. The selector matches a 16-hex worker identifier against each payable_item's worker_result_ids[]; 0 matches or 2+ matches abort before any sost-cli call. Drafts now record signing_scope (full_proposal | single_payable_item_subset), selected_worker_id_hash (16-hex or null) and source_proposal_payable_items_count, all required in the schema. Proposals with non-empty unresolved_items / deferred_items / rejected_items are refused even when a selector would otherwise pick a single match. Web console renders the three new fields. Trinity suite 713+ tests PASS. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wire-format or tx_signer changes. No real broadcast performed.
